seoTitle: Evanston South vs Everard Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evanston South and Everard Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evanston South vs Everard Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evanston South and Everard Park.
heading: Evanston South vs Everard Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evanston South, South Australia and Everard Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evanston South has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Everard Park (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evanston South or Everard Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evanston South has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Everard Park scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evanston South scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Everard Park scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evanston South or Everard Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evanston South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
